chunks.text: Bruce Hajek named ECE Illinois department head - EECS at Berkeley EECS alumnus Bruce Hajek (Ph.D. ’79, advisor: Eugene Wong), who has been on the faculty of the Grainger College of Engineering, and a researcher in the Coordinated Science Laboratory, at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign for 40 years, has been named head of UIUC’s Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE). Hajek is an internationally renowned expert in the field of communications networks and served as Editor-in-Chief of the IEEE Transactions on Information Theory, and as President of the IEEE Information Theory Society. Categories Alumni Honors View Open Faculty Positions
